sections.paragraph:
ἀναγϰαῖος, α, ον [ἀνάγκη]

—1. ‘pert. to meeting a need with focus on importance’ necessary, important: of bodily parts that have an important function 1 Cor 12:22; of meeting pressingneeds Tit 3:14. ἀναγϰαῖόν ἐστιν with inf. (and acc.) it is necessary... Ac 13:46; 2 Cor 9:5; Phil 2:25.

—2. close, intimate of friends [= Lat. necessarius] Ac 10:24.
